_description: DC Courts — Legal Case & Document Management System (DCSC-26-RFP-60). Full RFP with explicit proposal due date, questions deadline, and EST timezone throughout.

deadlines.label: Proposal submission deadline
deadlines.rawText: Proposals must be submitted by email ... no later than 11 a.m. EST on Friday, April 24, 2026

deadlines.label: Questions submission deadline
deadlines.rawText: Questions from prospective contractors/offerors must be submitted no later than 11:00 a.m. EST on April 13, 2026

_field_sources.PROPOSAL_DUE: Cover page lines 12-14 (CLOSING DATE: April 24, 2026 / CLOSING TIME: 11:00am EST), reinforced at L.10 (line ~14740) and proposal checklist (line ~14747)
_field_sources.QUESTIONS_DUE: Section B instructions (line ~144-146): 'Questions must be submitted no later than 11:00 a.m. EST on April 13, 2026'
_notes: Pre-proposal conference explicitly stated as not planned (line ~149)
Line ~14829 contains a typo with year 2025 instead of 2026 — all other references consistently say 2026
April 24 falls during EDT, but document consistently states EST — model may flag this ambiguity
